hero.title: Data flows like tide, intelligence emerges
hero.sub: Scaling embodied AI in the era of Scaling Law — with industrial-grade datasets, toolchain, and developer ecosystem.

svc.title: Our Services
svc.desc: From datasets · toolchain · all-in-one platform to developer ecosystem — one operator for embodied-AI industrial infrastructure.

s1.label: Large-scale datasets
s1.desc: Logistics · industrial · home · medical — four core verticals with continuous releases.

s2.label: Embodied-AI data toolchain
s2.desc: Three-step pipeline from capture to deliverable model · appliance delivery · LeRobot-native.

s3.label: One-click capture & pre-training
s3.desc: Capture device + elastic compute + model pre-training end-to-end — plug-and-play.

s4.label: Developer Center
s4.desc: API docs · skill store · entry-level arms · open-source datasets · academy — one entry.

c1.title: Frame-level QA · Industrial-grade Standards
c1.desc: Three-stage QA — auto alignment + vision anomaly screening + certified review. Ships aligned to LeRobot v3 / RLDS.

c2.title: Multi-city Capture Network
c2.desc: City-level sites with pro operators, industrial-grade delivery. Single/dual-arm, multi-view, force & tactile.

c3.title: Ecosystem Co-built · Mainstream Standards
c3.desc: Joint capture with 3C / EMS, medical, retail, logistics leaders. LeRobot v3 / RLDS & VLA-ready.
